arts.ttl: Liverpool, Arsenal, Aston Villa & Man City Possible Champions League Round of 16 Draws
arts.sum: All five British clubs made it through the League Phase of the Champions League - and now have a better idea of who they'll face in the next stage.

arts.ttl: Celtic transfer target signs new contract before loan switch
arts.sum: Celtic transfer target signs new contract before loan switch

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers names Celtic starting XI to take on Aston Villa
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has named his Celtic side to face Aston Villa in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Celtic potential Champions League knockout play-off opponents confirmed
arts.sum: Celtic will face either Real Madrid or Bayern Munich in the knockout play-off round of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers reflects on Celtic's Aston Villa Champions League tie, reacts to knockout playoff oppo
arts.sum: The Bhoys battled back against an Aston Villa side who took a shock 2-0 lead in the first five minutes of Celtic ‘s final Champions League group game of the season. Brendan Rodgers bursts with pride at Celtic showing vs Aston Villa

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers relishing Celtic Champions League challenge as he gives Real Madrid or Bayern Munich draw reaction
arts.sum: It was a ding-dong clash with the Hoops now set to face one of two European giants to reach the last 16.

arts.ttl: John Townley's Villa player ratings vs Celtic as 10 awarded after huge 4-2 win
arts.sum: Matty Cash was forced off injured in the 30th minute through injury, so John McGinn replaced him and moved into midfield alongside Youri Tielemans as Lamare Bogarde went to right-back. Watkins restored Villa's lead on the hour mark as he finished off a counter-attack which was started by Kamara, before excellent work from Rogers, McGinn and Ramsey.

arts.ttl: Jhon Duran classy Aston Villa gesture speaks volumes amid 'medical' claim
arts.sum: A young Aston Villa supporter will forever cherish a brief moment with Jhon Duran prior to the crucial Champions League tie with Celtic. Despite ongoing speculation over Duran's future at Villa Park, Villa boss Emery has insisted he would like to keep his player.

arts.ttl: Prince William makes Ollie Watkins feelings clear amid Arsenal transfer bid
arts.sum: Those victories had put them in a strong position to finish in the top eight in the table and qualify automatically for the next knockout stage of the Champions League, ahead of facing Celtic, who arrived at Villa Park in 18th place in the table and assured of a place in the play-offs to reach the knockout stage of the competition. Prince William was pictured punching the air as Ollie Watkins helped to fire Aston Villa to victory over Celtic - and into the last 16 of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Tierney will be Celtic player by summer - Rodgers
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers confirms that Scotland defender Kieran Tierney will move to Celtic from Arsenal this summer at the latest.
